campus.name: Heliopolis Campus
campus.description: Major Cairo-based campus focused on smart business education, technology-enabled learning, and international academic integration.

college.name: College of Management & Technology – Heliopolis
college.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport
college.positioning: Smart business management college emphasizing technology-driven education, ethical leadership, entrepreneurship, and international academic integration.
college.vision: To be recognized as one of the most reputable smart business management colleges in Egypt and the Middle East with a significant positive impact on the knowledge society.
college.mission: To provide high-quality business and management education using modern teaching methodologies, hands-on learning, and ethical foundations, while preparing graduates capable of contributing to local, regional, and global business environments.

international: University of London – Recognized Teaching Center

quality_assurance.description: Dedicated Quality Assurance Unit ensuring continuous improvement, academic excellence, ethical conduct, and compliance with international standards.

programs.name: Marketing and International Business
programs.focus: Marketing strategy, global business environments, consumer behavior, and international markets

programs.name: Business Information Systems
programs.focus: Business systems analysis, databases, decision support systems, and IT-enabled management

programs.name: Accounting
programs.focus: Financial accounting, auditing, taxation, and reporting

programs.name: Finance and Accounting
programs.focus: Corporate finance, financial analysis, investment, and accounting systems

programs.name: Digital and Sustainable Business Economics
programs.focus: Digital economy, sustainability, business analytics, and economic decision-making

programs.name: La Section Francophone
programs.focus: Business and management education delivered in French

best_for: Students preferring applied and group-based learning

vice_deans: Dr. Hady Omar Taha – Educational Affairs
Dr. Nihal Ismail Ayad – Training and Community Service
